latin: Quid facis in palude mea? ogrus viridis clamavit cum hospites non invitatos vidit. paludem suam amabat et solitudinem desiderabat.

questions.target: Uninvited guests have come to his swamp
choices: Uninvited guests have come to his swamp

translation: What are you doing in my swamp? The green ogre shouted when he saw uninvited guests. He loved his swamp and desired solitude.
